title: JUL-291 I Lost My Mind After 7 Days Of Being Fucked By My Husband's Boss... Airi Kijima I Lost My Mind After 7 Days Of Being Fucked By My Husband's Boss... Airi Kijima
description: My husband, who worked at the factory, was appointed to the sales department of the head office because of his ability. It seems that my sincere husband's efforts so far have been rewarded, and I myself was happy. Every day my husband is worried that he can't get results due to unfamiliar sales work, and he is inconvenienced even to Mr. Yamase who has been selected. At that time, the director visited me and promised to help my husband on the condition of my body. Seven days have passed since I accepted the condition to help my suffering husband.
